title: Patterns
description: Configuration defining Finite State Acceptors (FSAs) describing languages of strings for use in morphological rules.

source_path.description: The file path from which this config was loaded.

patterns.description: A list of pattern definitions, where each entry is a mapping of the pattern name to its configuration.

oneOf.description: A regular expression string that can be interpreted as an FSA.
A list of strings to be compiled as the union of FSAs.

_ref.description: A unique string surrounded by angle braces used to refer to this pattern in other rules or patterns.

test_includes.description: List of strings the pattern should accept.

test_excludes.description: List of strings the pattern should not accept.
